author: kitschpatrol
description: Sync flashcards from a folder in your vault to Anki. Pure Markdown syntax. No fuss.

manifest.author: Kitschpatrol
manifest.description: Sync flashcards from a folder in your vault to Anki. Pure Markdown syntax. No fuss.
manifest.name: Yanki

name: Yanki

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- e459c73 Release: 1.11.3
 - 176bb6e Don't ship zip or versions.json in GitHub releases.
 - 2a9c727 Limit supported Shiki code highlighting languages to reduce final bundle size via Yanki dependency update.
 - 5c98061 Update AnkiConnect branding to match Anki add-on style, not repo style.
 - 5bcadda Add eslint-plugin-obsidianmd.
 - 3028075 Update readme to point to new Obsidian community plugins page.
 - 3a7eccf Fix returning promises where void is expected.
 - d62fa18 Override vulnerable @xmldom/xmldom dependency version.
 - 7aa74ba Resolve unbound-method warnings.
 - c62e84c Update transitive dependencies.
 - 42109a8 Narrow template helper types.
 - 4ea8bef Use class instead of `setAttribute` in settings.
 - a0688f4 Explain lint rule exceptions in source comments.
 - 9bb2108 Declare peer dev dependencies to appease new Obsidian plugin scanner.
 - 1908884 Add release artifact attestation.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 930df87 Release: 1.11.2
 - 5bfae32 Fix issues with `}}` characters in clozed MathJax expressions.
 - 038b470 Update dependencies.
 - 36c5fe5 Harden release workflow.

Thank you to @l1mey112 for identifying the MathJax issue.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 2286827 Release: 1.11.1
 - 9e8da22 Add CI. (#69)
 - ed86bd0 Fix for error when number values are used in tags. Update dependencies.

Thank you to @avinashkanaujiya for identifying the numeric tag edge case.

Thank you to @paq for a Windows path fix in the upstream [yanki](https://github.com/kitschpatrol/yanki) project.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- b2754df Release: 1.11.0
 - 9d2a21d Feature: Add file explorer context menu item to add / remove a folder from the Anki flashcard folders list. Addresses #66. Thank you @Qwyntex for the suggestion.
 - b7461bc Add note to readme to clarify how ambiguous note structure edge cases are handled. Addresses #65.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 806464c Release: 1.10.1
 - ea7bc31 Fix for watched folder rename detection logic.
 - 62b0310 Use standard JavaScript in folder suggestion logic.
 - c120fbd Fix some readme typos.
 - 37bc887 Update dependencies. Incorporate Yanki updates with a number of fixes. Remove many lint rule exceptions now reflected in shared-config dependency.
   - Fix: Prevent RegEx injection when cleaning up base paths.
   - Fix: Media assets missing in Anki are re-uploaded correctly during sync even if notes are unmodified.
   - Fix: Orphaned deck deletion issue in sync.
   - Fix: Media sync when AnkiConnect is on a remote host.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 9120567 Release: 1.10.0
 - fa707e3 **Require Obsidian version 1.6.5 or newer.** Update dependencies.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:

 - a908f0a Fix for issues syncing media assets during note updates, and a fix for assets failing to sync when present in the "Extra" note field.

 - f4cf77b Fix links failing to update when flashcard notes are automatically renamed.
 - 7298d8e Update dependencies. New type import style.
 - 7b4926d Explicit Obsidian type dependency version. Should fix CVE-2021-38148.

 - 0bd9e51 Update dependencies.
 - 7e48c59 Rename the demo vault.

releases.author: kitschpatrol

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 147034c Release: 1.6.0
 - 65e3b5b Settings migration.
 - 3d2ce7c Update dependencies.
 - 1f2f6bb Fix inconsistencies in readme language.
 - cc46d07 Deprecate automatic sync feature.
 - cf06f72 Expose namespace in advanced settings, and save it to plugin settings. Update to Yanki v0.18.0 with more forgiving note ID handling. Addresses #23.
 - 8e855d2 Update demo vault core-plugins.json format.
 - 51b9465 Update Yanki dependency. Addresses #20.
 - f6ea46d Fix minimum Obsidian version requirement.
 - adf1e37 Escape regex characters from absolute paths. Addresses #28.
 - 64441f1 Update GitHub metadata workflow name.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:

 - f5c4146 Update dependencies. Includes Yanki update addressing tag-related issue in #25.

 - 9f81faa Add download data to readme.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 9ed4aa9 Release: 1.5.0
 - a765dfe Update Yanki dependency with support for DenDen Markdown style furigana syntax. Addresses #12.
 - fc2167c Add note to readme about lock-in.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 86703bc Release: 1.4.4
 - 6c1aec1 Document Yanki's control over specific note models in Anki.
 - 726d9a8 Use my GitHub handle as plugin author name.
 - 830c583 Document nuances of how Obsidian folders are mapped to Anki decks. Prevent #6 .
 - fc9858a Add note regarding AnkiconnectAndroid to readme. Addresses #15.
 - 9c0a729 Dependency updates.
 - 1606322 Dependency updates. Import sort order style changes.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:

 - 3e51447 Update Yanki with potential fixes for #6, #13, and #14.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- ea96952 Release: 1.4.2
 - a32c3a5 Respect Obsidian's "Strict line breaks" Editor setting. Addresses #10.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 0aea08e Release: 1.4.1
 - 83ba805 Fix: Correctly sync notes with block-embedding wiki-links. Addresses #11.
 - d57e67a Update dependencies.
 - 2f0b760 Add embedded block wiki-link example to Demo Vault.
 - afab8f9 Add another Jerry video link to readme, as mentioned in #9.
 - b839e67 Add some additional details on note types to the readme.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 64f938e Release: 1.4.0
 - 3c4f6d5 Add advanced syntax examples to Demo Vault.
 - fc28977 Update Yanki dependency with support for extra content in "Basic (and reversed card)" notes, plus fixes for note type inferrence in of notes with many thematic breaks.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- b742b59 Release: 1.3.0
 - 29e5006 Feature: Support for optional manual cloze numbering syntax. Addresses #4.
 - 81f6e68 Add links to @emisjerry videos to readme. As mentioned in issue #4.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 75243ef Release: 1.2.1
 - e80ad2c Update Yanki, fix regression in math rendering on Anki Mobile.
 - 87599e2 Update readme to reflect recent fixes and updates.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 7cd634a Release: 1.2.0
 - 725b243 Update Yanki dependency with support for GFM autolinks, Anki-native MathJax rendering, and a fix for "model not found" errors (#8).
 - a98673c Merge pull request #7 from herenowhere/patch-1
 - 51f9de5 Update README.md

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 1f6b552 Release: 1.1.1
 - c1791a8 Preserve HTML markup found in Obsidian notes.
 - b3b7a86 Allow verbose rename notices.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 7f30194 Release: 1.1.0
 - c488d8b Fix typos.
 - 634e82c Allow note renaming via settings button when auto-renaming is disabled. Improve notices.
 - 4a652d8 Features: Wiki link resolution, improved file error handling, and support for storing linked PDF and Markdown assets in Anki.
 - 8220660 Updates to the Demo Vault.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 201e279 Release: 1.0.6
 - d0b2589 Fix notice text spacing regression.
 - afea2b5 Set up example as demo folder as proper Obsidian vault.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:

 - 88e90ee Update Yanki to suppress markline error, partially addressing #2.
 - e09b657 Improve wording in notices and readme.
 - eedb9e4 Improve HTML formatting.
 - 5bbaff2 Update readme.
 - d974557 Fix plugin link.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- e25e7f9 Release: 1.0.4
 - 9578456 Update installation instructions in readme.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:

 - 386b143 Case fix.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:

 - 3eed3d4 Improve source comments.
 - e0ee351 Dependency updates.
 - a60be54 Refine readme.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 8b2f9a9 Release: 1.0.0
 - c685dc2 Update Yanki library with Windows fixes.
 - 926c8d6 Add rimraf for NPM script compatibility on Windows.
 - f9ab62d Normalize vault base path, fixes media asset issues on Windows.
 - bf66816 Only sync Markdown files.
 - f2601ff Fix inaccurate local note count in notice after sync command.
 - 4bd9947 Fix missing notice when files are empty.
 - 7d61969 Update readme.
 - 54fd743 Fix folder validation.
 - 5cacda5 Fix plugin ID and simplify description.
 - f45f5da Remove inline style.
 - 735125a Normalize folder paths.
 - d6392f6 Add banner.
 - 97d74f8 Add an example vault.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- d2cd731 Release: 0.8.2
 - 2e4890c Update Yanki library with support for syncing while offline.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 51e080c Release: 0.8.1
 - f9ad2e0 Update Yanki library  dependency with support for syncing the root of a vault.
 - 31267c3 Don't debounce updateNoteFilenames.
 - c2f4061 Update readme with privacy and security info. Put development settings behind a toggle. Remove now-diluted claims to being "ultra-simple".

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 899a792 Release: 0.8.0
 - 3dfdd49 Pass basePath to the Yanki library to correctly resolve embedded media assets.
 - 673fc38 Simplify asset sync options and document in readme.
 - dffda6f Fold media asset sync settings into the rest of the sync settings.
 - 79c1fad Feature: Media asset synchronization.
 - 5685352 Clarify Anki notes vs. cards in notices.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 7bef500 Release: 0.7.1
 - b601c0d Update Yanki dependency with fix for MathJax-only card fronts.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- ef91c06 Release: 0.7.0
 - c8cd742 Update Yanki dependency for non-destructive note model changes.
 - 0550fab Tweak notice language to better follow style guide.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 07f0e72 Release: 0.6.0
 - fe23df6 Preserve settings scroll position across renders.
 - 34665cd Optimize settings change handling.
 - 5fbfc3a Break out enabled and rename mode in Automatic file rename settings. Refine notice messages.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 6841535 Release: 0.5.0
 - 86f14bd Fix deleted file detection.
 - aa25c52 Move note name settings down in settings tab.
 - 5189fe8 Increase minimum sync interval now that file renames are immediate.
 - 7f0c0b7 Rename notes instantly, but sync lazily.
 - 9e3990b Dependency updates.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- c83a9ad Release: 0.4.0
 - d00d071 Move Anki connection detection to Yanki library. Allow automatic file names to update even if Anki is closed.
 - 34f2cb2 Remove unnecessary file rename event Notice.
 - cca941e Detect additional settings change conditions warranting a sync.
 - 622804c Remove throttleit.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- e616a06 Release: 0.3.0
 - 97afad6 Try a lower sync debounce interval.
 - 9064ee4 Feature: Automatic note name management.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 39742a8 Release: 0.2.4
 - 2486636 Use Osidian's requestUrl instead of fetch.
 - c6ba7d3 Fix extra white space in html.
 - 87fed18 Lint fixes.
 - 470bad4 Update Yanki.
 - 942657c UI text style fix.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 7ee63f4 Release: 0.2.3
 - 9ebaccc More links in settings descriptions. Add TOC to readme.
 - 868c528 Use character units for max description width.
 - 9f4b94f Clean up handling of HTML.
 - d20d4be Right-align button annotations.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 5dda2de Release: 0.2.2
 - befaa94 Prefer structuredClone.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- 71d39f4 Release: 0.2.1
 - 1409a8e Dependency updates.
 - 2270917 Change language to consistently refer to "notes" rather than "files".
 - 8f1dc2f Update GitHub action workflows.
 - 39c25ac Fix missing link in readme.
 - 06f13d1 Remove duplicate release workflow step.
 - a59edda Readme typos.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description:
- a9e1a99 Release: 0.2.0
 - 55905e2 Update yanki dependency.
 - 22d1928 Add Anki-Connect configuration instructions and other Obsidian Anki plugins to readme.
 - 0ec4cf7 Reduce debounce interval.
 - 1883a54 Improve how sync is called. Add feedback to settings. Add option to ignore folder notes.

releases.author: kitschpatrol
releases.description: - Initial release.
